meta-description: Learn about health statuses by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Health status
excerpt: Refers to your medical conditions (both physical and mental health), claims experience, receipt of health care, medical history, genetic information, evidence of insurability, and disability.
content: Refers to your medical conditions (both physical and mental health), claims experience, receipt of health care, medical history, genetic information, evidence of insurability, and disability.
